overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-slicked neon-lit urban street at night. The scene features towering skyscrapers with holographic billboards, elevated highway structures, wet reflective pavement, and various storefronts including food stands and cafes. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with teal and magenta neon lighting dominating the environment.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a dramatic upward angle showing towering skyscrapers against a teal night sky, then transitions to a third-person follow view of a character walking down a narrow cyberpunk street. The environment features an elevated highway structure overhead, industrial buildings with purple neon accents, and wet pavement reflecting the ambient light. A futuristic vehicle passes by on the left as the character walks forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with food stand and digital billboards

events.description: passing GIRUS food stand with bright red neon signage on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing walk past street vendors and illuminated storefronts

massive holographic billboard displaying advertisements above the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a medium-width commercial street lined with digital billboards and neon signage. The GIRUS food stand appears on the right with bright red neon illumination, while the elevated highway remains visible overhead. The pavement features orange tactile paving strips, and the wet concrete reflects the surrounding neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with shuttered storefronts and holographic advertisements

events.description: passing SPHERE building with circular logo and CALI EXPRESS shuttered storefront

agents.ego_description: walking past commercial buildings with closed metal shutters and neon accents

notable_agents.action: person in orange outfit standing near the CALI EXPRESS shuttered entrance

entered.detail: commercial building with large circular SPHERE logo signage in yellow and red
storefront with closed metal roll-down shutter featuring circular illuminated logo

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the street passing the SPHERE building with its distinctive circular signage and the shuttered CALI EXPRESS storefront. The sidewalk remains wet with reflective puddles, and more pedestrians appear in the distance. Overhead, multiple digital billboards display holographic advertisements while the elevated city infrastructure looms above.

scene_state.functional_zone: cafe district with neon-lit storefronts and outdoor seating

events.description: approaching KUTSUROGI CAFE with green neon OPEN sign and yellow facade
slowing down and stopping near BROOKLYN BARISTA with group of people outside

agents.ego_description: walking past cafes and approaching a group of people congregated outside Brooklyn Barista

notable_agents.action: group of three people standing and talking outside the Brooklyn Barista entrance
person in teal jacket walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: yellow storefront with green neon OPEN sign and Japanese text signage
cafe with bright pink neon BROOKLYN BARISTA signage and orange accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the character walking through a cafe district, passing the KUTSUROGI CAFE with its green neon open sign before approaching the BROOKLYN BARISTA. The area is populated with pedestrians standing outside the establishments, and the wet pavement continues to reflect the vibrant orange and pink neon lights. The character slows down and stops near the group outside the barista, concluding the walk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked urban corridor that transitions from a towering industrial canyon into a vibrant, pedestrian-filled cafe district. It begins with a dramatic upward tilt toward skyscrapers against a teal sky before dropping into a third-person follow view of a character walking beneath an elevated highway and purple neon accents. As the character moves forward, the industrial surroundings give way to a commercial street where the lighting shifts toward bright red hues near a GIRUS food stand and orange tactile paving. The scene then expands past the circular signage of the SPHERE building and shuttered storefronts, with holographic advertisements flickering overhead as more pedestrians emerge in the distance. Finally, the walk leads into a lively cafe district characterized by green and pink neon signs, passing the KUTSUROGI CAFE before the character slows to a stop near a group gathered outside the BROOKLYN BARISTA.
